title: Get $120 in summer food benefits for your child
body:
Each eligible child can receive **one $120 payment** for summer groceries.

Most eligible children get their payment automatically. Some need to submit an application. 

We can tell if you should apply for your child. Tap "Do I need to apply?" and enter your child's information.
accordionTitle: How do I know if my child can get Summer EBT?
body2: Any child could qualify for **one** of these reasons:
body3:
They are between ages 6 and 17. And they get SNAP (food stamps), Colorado Works (TANF), or Medicaid
Or they are temporarily unhoused or in foster care
Or they get free or low-cost meals at school, and they are enrolled in a school that participates in the National School Lunch Program (NSLP)
body4:
Children may be automatically enrolled if we have enough information to confirm their eligibility. 

If not, parents or guardians can apply to see if they qualify. Tap ["Apply now"](link) to find out if you should apply for your child.
